basic_details.job_title: Industry 4.0 Innovation Centre Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 40 years Maximum Age: 62 years

qualification.education_qualification: Engineering Graduate or Graduate degree from a recognized University / Institute.
qualification.details: Director: Engineering Graduate or Graduate degree from a recognized University / Institute. Minimum 5 years of working in Oil & Gas, Energy, Mining, Shipbuilding or Manufacturing Sector; and / or Experience of handling of Industry 4.0 Projects, or knowledge / experience of emerging technologies.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIC Director Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIC Director position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Director post at the Industry 4.0 Innovation Centre is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Director post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Director position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Director role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Director role is 62 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Director position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Director position ranges from ₹150000 to ₹300000 (IDA).

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for the Director post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be an Engineering Graduate or hold a Graduate degree from a recognized University/Institute.

faq.question: Q6. What type of experience is required for the Director role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of experience in Oil & Gas, Energy, Mining, Shipbuilding, or Manufacturing sectors is required, along with experience in Industry 4.0 Projects or emerging technologies.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for the IIC Director recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent via email to the designated official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Director post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Director post will primarily involve an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Deputation.
